plugins.name: pdm-release-planning
plugins.description: Release planning: scope, dependencies, risks, milestones, and launch checklists.

plugins.name: pdm-stakeholder-delivery
plugins.description: Stakeholder communication: status reports, delay handling, executive summaries, and steering decks.

plugins.name: pdm-agile-delivery
plugins.description: Agile delivery: sprint health, backlog grooming, definition of done, blocker triage, velocity analysis, PI planning, and flow metrics.

plugins.name: pdm-quality-testing
plugins.description: Quality and testing: test strategy, bug classification, UAT plans, and quality gates.

plugins.name: pdm-cross-team-coordination
plugins.description: Multi-team coordination: sync meetings, integration plans, API contracts, handoff templates, Three Amigos, and conflict resolution.

plugins.name: pdm-metrics-reporting
plugins.description: DORA metrics, delivery reports, blameless post-mortems, and lessons learned.

plugins.name: pdm-vendor-management
plugins.description: Vendor and third-party management: assessments, SLA reviews, procurement timelines, and risk.

plugins.name: pdm-toolkit
plugins.description: General delivery manager utilities: decision logs, change requests, meeting facilitation, and proofreading.

plugins.name: pdm-advanced-workflows
plugins.description: Advanced workflows: weekly routines, emergency protocols, and onboarding new team members.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Code and design review: analyze BRDs for gaps, review code quality, and review Figma designs against requirements.

plugins.name: knowledge-base
plugins.description: BRD knowledge base: index requirements in Google Drive, map dependencies, and retrieve business rules on demand.

plugins.name: delivery-kpi
plugins.description: Delivery KPIs from Jira: velocity, cycle time, defect rate, UAT pass rate, BRD coverage, and on-time delivery.

plugins.name: agile-coach
plugins.description: Agile Coach for teams starting from scratch. Assesses individuals by role, builds personal growth plans based on real Jira data, runs learning sessions and team challenges.

plugins.name: team-os
plugins.description: Team Operating System: Work Agreement, Ceremonies, DoD/DoR/AC, and Templates for Scrum, Kanban, Scrumban, and SAFe. Integrates with agile-coach.

plugins.name: lead-intelligence
plugins.description: Delivery Lead toolkit: System Thinking to diagnose root causes, Emotional Intelligence to read teams, communication frameworks for difficult conversations, conflict resolution, and influencing without authority.

plugins.name: product-mindset
plugins.description: Build product thinking in engineering teams: connect Stories to user value, validate assumptions before building, define success metrics, run discovery sessions, and shift from output to outcome mindset.
